title: Crime Patrol
desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life crime cases that revolve around harassment, kidnapping and murder.

title: CID
desc: ACP Pradyuman, Daya and Abhijeet are an elite trio of officers who work for the CID. They seek the help of professional forensic expert Dr Salunkhe and solve various criminal cases.

title: CID
desc: During a birthday party, a young lady named Sheetal gets murdered and is left inside a water park. Later, the CID team is called when her body is found floating lifelessly in a swimming pool.

title: CID
desc: Avantika, an heiress who lives alone, learns that the four people she invited to a party have declined. Later, Team CID is called to investigate when Avantika is found dead.

title: CID
desc: ACP Pradyuman, Daya and Abhijeet are an elite trio of officers who work for the CID. They seek the help of professional forensic expert Dr Salunkhe and solve various criminal cases.

title: CID
desc: Vishal's fiancee is helping him find the culprits behind his missing sister. Later, team CID steps in when she too disappears and they bump into Rocky, an elusive man, who helps them find a suspect.

title: CID
desc: ACP Pradyuman, Daya and Abhijeet are an elite trio of officers who work for the CID. They seek the help of professional forensic expert Dr Salunkhe and solve various criminal cases.

title: CID
desc: Billu, a music teacher who tutors a girl in a mysterious mansion, fails to return home. When his folks come looking, they are shocked to see him in blood-soaked clothes, playing the piano in a trance.

title: CID
desc: ACP Pradyuman, Daya and Abhijeet are an elite trio of officers who work for the CID. They seek the help of professional forensic expert Dr Salunkhe and solve various criminal cases.

title: CID
desc: Katori sends Vicky to sculptor Firgun to rob the Nebratamba. But when Vicky is killed by hired goons, Firgun hides the body in a lake with the Nebratamba hidden inside it.

title: CID
desc: ACP Pradyuman, Daya and Abhijeet are an elite trio of officers who work for the CID. They seek the help of professional forensic expert Dr Salunkhe and solve various criminal cases.

title: CID
desc: Late at night, Mohini wakes up to see a woman in a dancer's attire dragging away a blood-stained sack. Later, Team CID is baffled when Mohini claims that it was her uncle dressed as a woman.
